title: senna stowardii
intro: Senna stowardii, a species of flowering plant in the pea family, is a legume native to tropical Africa. The plant contains anthraquinones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senna stowardii include relief from constipation, irritable bowel syndrome, and certain skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Senna stowardii can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or powder, and is often used in traditional African medicine to promote overall well-being.
